rules.name: GitHub Token
rules.description: Detect GitHub Personal Access Token (ghp_/gho_/ghu_/ghs_/ghr_) and GitLab Token (glpat-)

rules.name: OpenAI API Key
rules.description: Detect OpenAI API Key (sk-proj- / sk-svcacct- format)

rules.name: Anthropic API Key
rules.description: Detect Anthropic Claude API Key (sk-ant-api format)

rules.name: Cloud Platform Credential
rules.description: Detect cloud platform credentials: AWS (AKIA/ASIA), GCP, Azure, Alibaba, Tencent Cloud, DigitalOcean, Oracle Cloud, IBM Cloud

rules.name: SaaS API Key
rules.description: Detect SaaS platform keys: Stripe, Twilio, Slack, Docker Hub, npm, GitLab, Datadog, NewRelic, PagerDuty, SendGrid, Mailgun, Mailchimp, HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, SonarQube, Atlassian, Grafana, HashiCorp, Cloudflare, Heroku

rules.name: Generic Password/Secret
rules.description: Detect generic password/secret/API key assignments in key=value form

patterns.value: (?:password|passwd|pwd|密码|密钥|凭证|令牌|api密钥|登录密码|数据库密码|secret|api[_-]?key|api[_-]?secret|auth[_-]?token|access[_-]?token|auth[_-]?bearer|SECRET_KEY|API_KEY|ACCESS_KEY|AUTH_TOKEN|DB_PASSWORD)\s*(?:[:=：]|是：?|为：?)\s*['"]?[A-Za-z0-9_@#$%^&+=!一-鿿]{6,}
(?:password|passwd|pwd|数据库密码|DB\s*[Pp]assword|数据库.*密码)\s+(?:is\s*[:=]?|[:=]|：|は\s*[:=]?|是)\s+['"]?[A-Za-z0-9_@#$%^&+=!]{6,}

rules.name: Private Key / PEM Certificate
rules.description: Detect PEM-format private keys and certificates: RSA/OPENSSH/DSA/EC/Ed25519/PGP/PKCS#8

rules.name: JWT Token
rules.description: Detect JWT/Bearer Token (Base64 URL triple segments starting with eyJ)

rules.name: Database Connection String
rules.description: Detect database connection string leak: mysql://, postgresql://, mongodb://, redis://, etc.

rules.name: Crypto Wallet / Blockchain Key
rules.description: Detect cryptocurrency wallet addresses and private keys

rules.name: Phone Number
rules.description: Detect global phone numbers with auto-redaction: China, US/CA, UK, DE, FR, JP, KR, IN, BR, AU, RU, Middle East, Africa

rules.name: National ID Number
rules.description: Detect national ID numbers globally: China ID, US SSN, UK NINO, Japan MyNumber, Korea RRN, India Aadhaar/PAN, Canada SIN, Brazil CPF/CNPJ, Australia TFN, etc.

rules.name: Email Address
rules.description: Detect email addresses (local-part@domain.tld)

rules.name: Credit Card Number
rules.description: Detect global credit/debit card numbers with Luhn validation: Visa, MasterCard, AMEX, Discover, Diners, JCB, China UnionPay

rules.name: Passport Number
rules.description: Detect global passport numbers: China (E/F/G+8 digits), US, UK, Canada, Australia, Japan, Korea, Germany, France, Brazil, India, Russia

rules.name: IBAN / Bank Account
rules.description: Detect international bank account numbers: IBAN, US ABA+account, UK Sort+Account, Canada Transit+Account, Australia BSB+Account, China debit card, India IFSC

rules.name: Public IP Address (PII)
rules.description: Detect public IPv4/IPv6 addresses as PII (excluding private/internal ranges)

rules.name: Full Name / Real Name
rules.description: Detect full names in context: Chinese (2-4 characters), Western (First Last), email name fragments, signature blocks

rules.name: Date of Birth
rules.description: Detect dates of birth in various formats: ISO, Chinese, US, European

rules.name: GDPR Art.9 Special Category Data
rules.description: Detect GDPR Article 9 special category personal data: health/medical, biometric, genetic, political opinions, religious beliefs, union membership, race/ethnicity, sexual orientation

patterns.value: (?:基因|基因检测|基因突变|生物特征|指纹|虹膜|人脸识别)
(?:种族|种族类别|民族|政治倾向|宗教信仰|性取向|工会|哲学|政治观点)
(?:选民|选举|政治党派|政党|民主|共和|政治立场)

rules.name: Prompt Injection
rules.description: Detect prompt injection attacks: system instruction override, system prompt rewriting, reverse control instructions, Unicode variant bypass, base64/hex encoded injection

patterns.value: (?:以前|過去|前に|これまで|今まで).{0,20}(?:指示|命令|指令|ルール|規則|制限).{0,20}(?:無視|忘れ|スキップ|バイパス|オーバーライド|無効)
(?:すべての|全ての|これまでの|今までの).{0,10}(?:指示|命令|指令|ルール|制限).{0,10}(?:無視|忘れ|無効|バイパス)
(?:システムプロンプト|AI|アシスタント).{0,20}(?:上書き|オーバーライド|無視|変更|バイパス)

rules.name: Jailbreak / Role-Play Attack
rules.description: Detect jailbreak attacks: role-playing (DAN, AoE), developer mode, simulated conversation, adversarial prompts, encrypted hiding, multi-turn incremental jailbreak

patterns.value: (?:开发者模式|开发模式|developer mode|dev mode|unlocked mode|free mode|freedom mode)
(?:grandma|grandmother|late|deceased|passed\s+away|奶奶|祖母|亡くなった|死んだ|死去した).*(?:password|secret|key|code|read|told|念|说|读|保险柜|密码|パスワード|金庫|合言葉|番号|読ん|教え)
(?:学术研究|学术目的|教育目的|仅用于研究|科研项目|只是为了.*学术)
(?:不受约束|不受限制|无限模式|无限制模式|突破限制|解除限制|破解限制)
(?:亡くなった|死んだ|死去した|他界した|故).{0,10}(?:祖母|祖父|父|母|おばあちゃん|おじいちゃん).{0,30}(?:パスワード|暗号|秘密|合言葉|番号|読ん|教え|金庫|セーフ)
(?:あなたは|お前は|君は).{0,10}(?:DAN|制限のない|無制限|自由|なんでも|何でも).{0,20}(?:モード|AI|アシスタント|状態)
(?:制限|規制|ルール|規則|フィルター|ガードレール).{0,10}(?:回避|バイパス|無効|解除|突破|無視|スキップ)

rules.name: OS Command Injection
rules.description: Detect OS command injection in prompts: shell injection, backtick execution, argument injection, Windows commands, encoding bypass

rules.name: SQL Injection in Prompt
rules.description: Detect SQL injection features: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, Oracle, SQLite, NoSQL MongoDB $where injection, Couchbase N1QL injection

rules.name: NoSQL Injection
rules.description: Detect NoSQL injection features: MongoDB $where/$ne/$gt/$regex operator injection, JSON injection, REST API parameter injection, Couchbase N1QL injection, Firebase bypass

rules.name: SSTI (Server-Side Template Injection)
rules.description: Detect template injection payloads: Jinja2, Handlebars/Mustache, Mako, Freemarker, Velocity, Thymeleaf, Twig, Smarty, Pug, Nunjucks, Jade

rules.name: XXE / XML Injection
rules.description: Detect XML External Entity injection: DOCTYPE, ENTITY, SYSTEM file://, DTD external reference, XInclude, SOAP XML injection, SVG XXE

rules.name: LDAP Injection
rules.description: Detect LDAP injection patterns: filter injection, DN injection, search base tampering

rules.name: Indirect Prompt Injection
rules.description: Detect hidden injection from external/untrusted sources: web hidden text, zero-width injection, email signature injection, third-party library README hidden instructions, forum code attack payloads

rules.name: SSRF Intent
rules.description: Detect user asking AI to access internal services or cloud metadata: AWS metadata, GCP metadata, Azure metadata, K8s API Server, internal networks, internal service names

rules.name: System Prompt Extraction
rules.description: Detect user trying to extract AI system instructions: request to repeat system prompt verbatim, reverse-engineer system prompt, step-by-step extraction, code block output, token-by-token extraction

patterns.value: (?:重复|输出|打印|显示).*(?:系统指令|系统提示|system prompt|全部指令)
(?:システムプロンプト|システム指示|最初のメッセージ|初期設定|プロンプト).{0,20}(?:出力|表示|印刷|見せ|教え|コピー|ペースト)

rules.name: Homoglyph / Unicode Confusion
rules.description: Detect homoglyph/Unicode confusion attacks: full-width characters, Latin-Cyrillic substitutions, zero-width insertion, bidirectional text override, Unicode normalization attacks

rules.name: Base64 / Encoded Payload
rules.description: Detect highly encoded/obfuscated hidden attack instructions: Base64 long strings, multi-layer encoding, image/file steganography, string split/join evasion, XOR encoding, ROT13, custom encoding

rules.name: Non-linguistic / Format Probing
rules.description: Detect non-linguistic model probing behavior: base64/hex/binary messages without natural language, single special character probing, prompt format fuzzing, model identity probing, parameter boundary value injection

patterns.value: ^(?:What\s+(?:model|version|AI|LLM|AI model|AI system|AI assistant)|Who\s+(?:made|created|built|developed|designed|programmed)|Which\s+(?:company|organization|team))\s+(?:are you|made you|built you|created you|developed you|programmed you|designed you)

(?:What\s+(?:model|version|AI|LLM|AI model|AI system|AI assistant)|Who\s+(?:made|created|built|developed|designed|programmed)|Which\s+(?:company|organization|team))\s+(?:are you|made you|built you|created you|developed you|programmed you|designed you)

rules.name: Sensitive File Read
rules.description: Detect user asking to read sensitive files: .env, credentials.json, system files, SSH keys, cloud metadata endpoints, K8s secrets, certificates, system DBs

patterns.value: (?:read|open|view|get|fetch|show|display|dump|cat|less|more|tail|head|list|输出|读取|打开|查看|显示|打印)\s*(?:the\s+|this\s+|that\s+)?(?:content|file|document|config|configuration|settings|file content|源码|代码|文件|配置|内容|日志)
(?:\.env|环境变量|env\s+文件).*(?:读取|配置|数据库|密码|secret|token|key|连接串)
(?:kubeconfig|证书|ca\.pem|\.pem|\.key|id_rsa).*(?:读取|查看|显示|配置|内容)
(?:読み取り|読み込む|開く|表示|見る|取得|cat|read|取得).{0,20}(?:\.env|credentials|\.git/config|\.npmrc|\.aws|\.kube|\.ssh/id_rsa|\/etc\/passwd|\/etc\/shadow)
(?:\.env|credentials|\.aws).*(?:読み取り|読み込む|開く|表示|見る|取得|内容)

rules.name: Credential Repository File
rules.description: Detect user asking to read credential/config repository files: .git/config, .git-credentials, .npmrc, .pypirc, .dockercfg, ~/.aws/credentials, GCP service account, Azure profile, K8s config, Gradle/Maven settings, Terraform state

rules.name: Large Binary File
rules.description: Detect user referencing large/binary files: .db/.sqlite, .exe/.dll/.so, .zip/.tar.gz/.7z/.rar, .iso/.dmg, .bin/.dat, .pcap, .min.js, .pyc/.class, .dmp, .vmdk/.qcow2

patterns.value: (?:read|open|view|analyze|examine|process|load|upload|import|extract|unzip|解压|读取|分析|打开|加载|上传|导入|处理)\s*(?:this|that|the\s+)?(?:file|archive|binary|executable|image|database|dump|zip|压缩包|文件|二进制|数据库)
\d+\s*(?:MB|GB|KB|M|G|兆).*(?:文件|binary|sqlite|exe|dll|pcap|数据库|可执行|二进制)
(?:分析|读取|打开|解压|提取|处理).*\d+\s*(?:MB|GB|KB|兆|G).*(?:文件|pcap|sqlite|exe|zip|tar|7z)

rules.name: Zip Slip / Archive Extraction Risk
rules.description: Detect path traversal risk in archive extraction: Zip Slip (../ in entry names), tar symlink escape, RAR absolute path attack

patterns.value: (?:extract|unzip|untar|decompress|解压|提取|展开|解凍|解凍する).*(?:\.\.\/|%2e%2e%2f|\.\.%2f)
(?:extract|unzip|untar|decompress|解凍|解凍|展開|解压).{0,50}(?:\\.\\.\/|\\.\\.%2f|%2e%2e|path traversal|上述|上記)

rules.name: Multi-modal / File-based Hidden Payload
rules.description: Detect hidden attack instructions in non-plaintext files: image metadata steganography, PDF metadata, SVG malicious scripts, Office document macros, archive path traversal, Markdown/HTML hidden content

patterns.value: (?:PDF|pdf|文档|文件).*(?:嵌入式|隐藏|包含|含有).*(?:JavaScript|脚本|JS|宏|VBA|script|macro)
(?:提取|读取|分析|查看).*(?:隐藏|hidden|embedded|嵌入).*(?:内容|数据|脚本|metadata|元数据)

rules.name: Proprietary Code / Copyright Ingestion
rules.description: Detect user input that may infringe intellectual property: analyzing third-party closed-source code, reverse engineering binaries, deobfuscating copyrighted software, explaining NDA-protected code, reproducing competitor core logic

patterns.value: (?:反编译|decompile|逆向|reverse|分析|analyze|反混淆|deobfuscate).*(?:二进制|binary|exe|dll|可执行|闭源|\.NET|class|字节码)
(?:反混淆|deobfuscate|去混淆|unminify|还原).*(?:代码|JS|JavaScript|脚本|script|程序)
(?:NDA|保密协议|非公开|专有|proprietary|机密|internal\s+use).*(?:代码|code|review|分析|analyze|检查|审计)
(?:リバース|逆コンパイル|逆アセンブル|デコンパイル|逆解析).{0,30}(?:エンジニア|バイナリ|実行可能|exe|dll|\.NET|class|コード|プログラム)

rules.name: Resource Exhaustion / Compression Bomb
rules.description: Detect user inducing AI to consume excessive compute resources: zip bomb extraction, recursive expansion, giant output generation, self-referencing recursion, catastrophic backtracking

patterns.value: (?:递归|递归展开|nested|嵌套|recursive).*(?:解压|extract|unzip|展开|expand|loop).*\d+.*(?:层|级|次|times|iterations|rounds)
(?:生成|输出|打印|写出|write|generate|print|output).*(?:\d+\s*(?:万|亿|千|百|million|billion|thousand|hundred)).*(?:行|条|个|件|文件|lines|records|items)
(?:zip\s+bomb|压缩炸弹|压缩包炸弹).*(?:解压|extract|unzip|打开|10000|1000|100\s*次)
(?:解压|解凍|extract|unzip|expand).{0,40}(?:zip bomb|压缩炸弹|zip 爆弾|圧縮爆弾).{0,40}(?:\d{3,}|many|大量|何度も|複数|1000|10000)
(?:zip bomb|zip 爆弾|圧縮爆弾|zip bomb アーカイブ|zip bomb archive|压缩炸弹).*(?:解压|解凍|extract|unzip|打開|expand|展開)
(?:解压|压缩|解凍|extract|unzip|expand|展開|unpack).{0,50}(?:zip bomb|压缩炸弹|zip 爆弾|圧縮爆弾|zip bomb アーカイブ)
(?:zip bomb|压缩炸弹|zip 爆弾|爆弾アーカイブ).{0,50}(?:解压|压缩|解凍|extract|unzip|expand|展開|unpack)
(?:解压|解凍|extract|unzip|expand).*?(?:zip bomb|压缩炸弹|zip 爆弾|圧縮爆弾).*?(?:\d{3,}|1000|10000|many)

rules.name: Context Pollution
rules.description: Detect if multi-turn conversation context has been polluted by injection attacks. Once flagged, subsequent messages are marked even if content-safe. User can 'clear history' to reset

patterns.value: (?:继续|接着|然后|接下来|下一步|再说|再来|如上|前述|上述|继续|继续下去|continuation|continue|following|previous|as mentioned).{0,30}(?:代码|优化|优化一下|修改|调整|看一看|改一下|写一个|生成|创建|改进|improve|optimize|update|change|modify)
(?:继续|接着|然后|接下|如上|上述|如前|前述|再说|再来|然后|刚刚|刚才|之前|前文|上一轮|上一).{0,30}(?:代码|优化|修改|调整|看一看|改一下|写一个|生成|创建|改进|改进一下|看看|帮|帮我|优化一下|improve|optimize|update|modify|write|create|generate|help)
帮我把这段代码优化一下|帮我写一段普通的|请优化|优化这段|优化一下代码|帮我把

rules.name: Oversized Input
rules.description: Detect input exceeding 100,000 characters. Auto-truncate. Log original and truncated length to audit log

rules.name: Control / Zero-Width Characters
rules.description: Clean zero-width characters, control characters, backspace/delete/escape sequences, BOM markers from input

patterns.value: (?:含む|含ん|含まれ|contain|contains|containing|包含|含有|含).{0,30}(?:ゼロ幅|zero-width|零宽|制御文字|control.char)

rules.name: Authorized Data Declaration
rules.description: Context modifier rule. Detect authorized/compliant data declarations to reduce PII rule severity: 'authorized', 'anonymized', 'GDPR compliant', 'consent obtained', '已授权', '已脱敏', etc.

patterns.value: (?:匿名化|匿名加工|非特定化|マスキング|ダミー|テストデータ|許可|同意).{0,20}(?:データ|情報|ユーザー)

rules.name: Contextual PII Handling
rules.description: Context engine rule. Dynamically adjust PII strategy: 'test data'/'example' reduces severity, 'customer_data'/'production'/'real user' escalates to P0, 'PII'/'personal data' forces block

rules.name: Contextual Suspicion Score / Split Attack
rules.description: Detect cross-message split attacks: malicious intent split across individually safe requests building toward hostile behavior. Tracks cumulative suspicion score per session

rules.name: Context Reset Bypass
rules.description: Detect user trying to bypass context pollution detection by resetting conversation: 'Forget everything', 'Start fresh', 'Clear history', 'Restart conversation'

patterns.value: (?:start\s+(?:a\s+)?(?:new|fresh)|restart|重新开始|新对话|新建)\s*(?:conversation|chat|session|thread|dialog|对话|聊天|会话)
(?:忘れ|無視|クリア|リセット|消去|削除|リスタート|初期化|リセット).{0,20}(?:会話|チャット|履歴|記憶|メモリ|過去|以前|セッション|会話履歴|すべて|全て|全部)

rules.name: Social Engineering / Pretexting
rules.description: Detect social engineering and false identity impersonation: 'security auditor', 'CEO requesting bypass', 'emergency disable security', 'AI trainer needs unrestricted mode', forged authorization, threat/intimidation language

patterns.value: (?:I\s+(?:work|am)|我是)\s*(?:for|at|with)\s+(?:security|compliance|audit|legal|IT\s+security|安全|合规|审计|法务|IT安全)
(?:I\s+will\s+(?:be\s+)?(?:fired|lose\s+(?:my\s+)?job|reported|sued|sacked)|我会被|我将被|会被开除|会被解雇|会被起诉)
(?:私は|私が).{0,20}(?:CEO|CTO|セキュリティ|監査|監査部門|セキュリティ監査|IT管理者|マネージャー|部長|責任者|管理者)
(?:緊急|至急|すぐに|今すぐ|至急|早急).{0,20}(?:セキュリティ|ルール|制限|安全).{0,20}(?:無効|停止|解除|バイパス|緩和)

rules.name: AI Proxy / Security Control Bypass
rules.description: Detect user trying to bypass or disable Kasra security proxy controls: direct API connection bypass, disable/modify security rules, clear/tamper audit logs, turn off security monitoring, obtain direct API key

patterns.value: (?:删除|清除|销毁|抹除|清理|修改|篡改).*(?:审计日志|审计记录|audit\s*log|操作日志|系统日志|日志记录)
(?:delete|remove|clear|erase|tamper|modify|alter|purge|destroy).{0,30}(?:audit.log|audit trail|audit record|監査ログ|監査記録|ログ|log).{0,30}(?:trace|record|留下|残ら|痕迹|痕跡)
(?:バイパス|迂回|直接).{0,10}(?:セキュリティ|ゲートウェイ|gateway|プロキシ|proxy).{0,20}(?:接続|アクセス|connect|access)
(?:監査ログ|監査記録|audit.log|アクセスログ|操作ログ|システムログ).{0,20}(?:削除|消去|クリア|消し|削除).{0,20}(?:記録|残さ|痕跡|トレース)
(?:セキュリティ|安全).{0,10}(?:ゲートウェイ|ゲート).*(?:バイパス|迂回|無効|解除)

rules.name: RCE / Reverse Shell Intent
rules.description: Detect user asking AI to generate or execute reverse shell / remote command execution code: reverse shell payloads, script download-execute, webshell generation, code execution backdoors

rules.name: Supply Chain / Dependency Confusion
rules.description: Detect user asking AI to tamper with dependency sources or introduce suspicious packages: unofficial index URLs, suspicious Git URL dependencies, download-execute unknown scripts, typo-squatting package names, local file path dependencies

rules.name: Data Exfiltration Intent
rules.description: Detect user asking AI to exfiltrate/leak data: sending data to external URLs, writing to publicly accessible locations, DNS exfiltration, email/webhook data send, encoded/obfuscated exfiltration

patterns.value: (?:发送|上传|输出|导出|泄露|外泄).*(?:到|to|发到).*(?:webhook|外部|远程|外网|external|attacker)

(?:POST|send|upload|送信|送る).*(?:/etc|password|secret|data|content|passwd|key|token|credential|证书|密码|密钥|config).*(?:https?://|evil|attacker|malicious|collect|exfil|外部|攻撃|悪意|remote|リモート).*(?:via|by|through|using|with|経由|で|を使っ|使用|通过)
(?:通过|使用|利用).{0,5}(?:curl|wget).{0,30}(?:POST|发送|上传|提交|外泄|泄露|发送到|発送|送信).{0,20}(?:到|至|给|へ|に|向).{0,10}(?:https?://|www|external|attacker|evil|悪意|攻撃|外部|远程|リモート)
(?:curl|wget|netcat|nc).{0,30}(?:POST|送信|发送).{0,30}(?:到|to|へ|に).{0,10}(?:https?://|http|attacker|evil|collect|攻击|攻撃|外部|remote|リモート|悪意)
(?:curl|wget).{0,30}(?:POST|送信|发送).{0,30}(?:https?://|attacker|evil|collect|外部|攻撃|悪意|remote|リモート|アタッカー)

(?:/etc|password|secret|passwd|key|token|credential|证书|密码).{0,60}(?:POST|send|upload|送信|发送|送る|外泄|泄露).{0,30}(?:via|by|through|using|with|経由|で|を使っ|使用|通过|を使用し).{0,20}(?:curl|wget|httpie).{0,30}(?:https?://|http:\/\/)
(?:curl|wget).{0,20}(?:POST|送信|发送|送る|発送).{0,20}(?:で|を|に|が).{0,30}(?:https?://|http:\/\/|attacker|evil|集|外|悪|攻|evil|collect|hook)
(?:curl|wget|POST|send|送信|发送).*?(?:https?://|attacker|evil|collect|exfil|外部|攻撃|悪意|remote|リモート|アタッカー).*?(?:data|file|content|passwd|password|secret|config|key|token|credential|证书|密码|密钥|情報|データ)

rules.name: Crypto Ransomware / Extortion Intent
rules.description: Detect user asking to generate ransomware/extortion code: file encryption code, ransom note generation, key management, persistence/escalation code

patterns.value: (?:ランサムウェア|ランサム|身代金|復号).{0,30}(?:作成|生成|作る|書く|develop|write|generate|build|create|コード|プログラム)
(?:全ファイル|全てのファイル|ユーザのファイル|ユーザーの.{0,10}ファイル).{0,30}(?:暗号化|暗号).{0,30}(?:身代金|復号料|赎金|ransom|要求)

rules.name: Cryptocurrency Mining / Abuse Intent
rules.description: Detect user asking to generate cryptomining/resource abuse code: mining code generation, batch deployment, resource consumption code

patterns.value: (?:mine|cryptomining|crypto\s*mining|挖矿|矿池|矿机)\s*(?:bitcoin|monero|ethereum|dogecoin|比特币|以太坊|门罗币)

rules.name: Phishing / Credential Harvesting Intent
rules.description: Detect user asking to generate phishing/credential harvesting code: clone login pages, credential collectors, phishing email templates, QR code phishing

patterns.value: (?:clone|copy|replicate|reproduce|伪造|克隆|仿制|山寨|制作|创建|生成).*(?:login|signin|login page|signin page|登录|登录页|登录界面|密码输入).*(?:of|for|from|模仿|仿照|页面|地址|网址|网站)?
克隆.*(?:Google|微软|Microsoft|Apple|百度|支付宝|微信|银行).*(?:登录|页面|界面|网站)
(?:クローン|複製|伪造|コピー|模倣).*?(?:ログインページ|ログイン画面|サインインページ|login page|登录页|Google|Microsoft|Apple).*?(?:収集|取得|盗む|窃取|送信|harvest|collect|steal|認証情報|credential|凭证|ユーザー情報|個人情報|パスワード)
(?:クローン|コピー|複製|模倣|偽造).*?(?:ログイン|サインイン|login|signin|Google|Microsoft|Apple|銀行|バンク).*(?:収集|取得|盗む|窃取|harvest|steal|collect|認証|credential|パスワード|情報)
(?:ログインページ|ログイン画面|サインインページ|login page|Google|Microsoft|Apple).*?(?:クローン|複製|コピー|模倣|偽造|伪造|コピー).*?(?:収集|取得|盗む|窃取|harvest|collect|steal|認証|credential|パスワード|情報)

rules.name: Privilege Escalation / Persistence Intent
rules.description: Detect user asking to generate privilege escalation/persistence code: add sudoers, create hidden admin accounts, schedule cron/systemd tasks, disable security software/firewall

patterns.value: netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off
(?:隐藏的管理员|隐藏.*账户|后门|backdoor|提权|persistence|rootkit|免杀)
(?:禁用|关闭|停用|停止).*(?:Windows\s+Defender|defender|防火墙|firewall|安全软件|杀毒|防病毒|安全防护)
(?:禁用|关掉|关闭|停用).*(?:UAC|selinux|apparmor|SELinux|安全策略|安全控制|访问控制)
